mapper.select: SELECT sp.id, sp.type, sp.progress, CASE WHEN sp.type = 'course' THEN c.title WHEN sp.type = 'column' THEN col.title END as title, CASE WHEN sp.type = 'course' THEN c.cover WHEN sp.type = 'column' THEN col.cover END as cover FROM osh_user_studyprogress sp LEFT JOIN osh_course c ON sp.goods_id = c.id AND sp.type = 'course' LEFT JOIN osh_column col ON sp.goods_id = col.id AND sp.type = 'column' WHERE sp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sp.update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_user_studyprogress ( user_id, goods_id, type, progress, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{vo.id}, #{vo.type}, #{vo.progress}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE progress = VALUES(progress), update_time = NOW()
